name: Tenacity Relic
description: The Tenacity Relic is a common Eridian-made relic in Borderlands 2.
notes: Its bonus overlaps with the Heart of the Ancients, which effectively pairs Aggression and Tenacity effects in one relic.

special.description:
Extends the time you can stay in Fight For Your Life before dying.

Some versions also boost the health you regain after getting a Second Wind.
